warnings: This 'มาตรฐานสัญลักษณ์และรายการสุขภัณฑ์' table defines what each fixture abbreviation means (symbol/type legend), same 14-item set and identical wording to house 1's equivalent legend (หน้า11 there) — cross-consistent, confirms accurate reading.

This sheet (A-10) also contains 2 further distinct views not covered by this file: the WC.1 floor plan (1:25) — see sibling _หน้า12_wc1_plan.json — and a fixture-mounting-height elevation strip (มาตรฐานระดับการติดตั้งสุขภัณฑ์) — see sibling _หน้า12_fixture_height_schedule.json. Mount heights are captured in that sibling file rather than duplicated here, since the height strip prints per-fixture heights separately from this symbol table (unlike house 1's A-09 sheet, which combined the symbol table and height strip into one file).

Note: on house 2's sheet, this symbol/legend table itself does not print mount_height_m inline per row (unlike house 1's equivalent table) — heights are only shown in the separate elevation strip at the bottom of the same physical sheet, hence the deliberate 3-way file split here versus house 1's 2-way split.
